OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Stephen Kish, is present.
Attorney, Karen Uchiyama, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Alex Koomanoff, is present.
Attorney, Paul Behernd, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-18-2010 is vacated.
